code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test02-AUG-2018Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low total CO₂, and significant proteinuria, suggesting possible renal impairment with metabolic acidosis. Urinalysis reveals protein, glucose, bilirubin, ketones, low specific gravity, and abnormal color/appearance, supporting renal dysfunction. HbA1c is low, which may indicate hypoglycemia or a hemoglobinopathy. Recommend further nephrological evaluation and assessment for underlying metabolic or hematological disorders.
